title: Creamy Greek Zucchini Grill
description: A buttery, creamy grilled zucchini dish bursting with fresh herbs, perfect as a Mediterranean hangover cure and keto-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat.
Brush the zucchini rounds with melted butter, season with salt, pepper, oregano, and minced garlic.
Grill the zucchini, about 3-4 minutes per side, until lightly charred and tender.
While the zucchini is grilling, whisk together Greek yogurt, crumbled feta, dill, parsley, and a squeeze of lemon juice to make the creamy sauce.
Transfer the grilled zucchini to a serving platter, drizzle with the creamy sauce, and sprinkle extra dill and parsley on top.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges on the side for extra brightness.
Optional: add a pinch of crushed red pepper for heat.
Enjoy this creamy, buttery zucchini as a refreshing, hangover-friendly Mediterranean dish.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
